title: PARENT EDUCATION AND SUPPORT - 211info
text: LIFEWORKS NW KING PARENT EDUCATION AND SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Family and Community Alliance (FCA) and Family Support and Connections (FSC) provide home-based parent education, advocacy, and connection to community resources. 3716 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Varies by program FSC: TANF recipients Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 283-4776 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Program phone (503) 283-4776 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: Varies by program. Nearly all LifeWorks Northwest programs accept OHP/Medicaid and Medicare. Some programs serve uninsured individuals or offer free or discounted services. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-8pm, Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet Bus 6 Services: Home Based Parenting Education Home Based Parenting Education * TANF Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - INTENSIVE COMMUNITY-BASED SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - SEVERE MENTAL ILLNESS SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TRANSITION-AGE YOUTH SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADULT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWORKS NW KING
